subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
signupSubtitle: Create an account to get started!
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email, and we'll send you a link to get into your account.
forgotPasswordConfirmation: If there is an account associated with the email you entered, you will receive an email with instructions on how to reset your password.

actions.useBackupCode: Can't access your authenticator? Use a backup code

messages.agreement: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

errors.loginFailedMessage: An error occurred, please try again
errors.primaryUsernameRequired: Primary username is required for sub account login
errors.subAccountNameRequired: Sub account name is required for sub account login
errors.googleLoginFailedMessage: Couldn't log in with Google, please try again
errors.appleLoginFailedMessage: Couldn't log in with Apple, please try again
errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 4 characters
errors.passwordLength: Password must be between 8 and 64 characters
errors.displayNamePattern: Display name can only contain letters and numbers
errors.usernamePattern: Username can only contain lowercase letters, dot and dash
errors.resetEmailSentMessage: Check your email for password reset instructions
errors.resetFailedMessage: Failed to send reset email, please try again later
errors.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.instruction: Enter the verification code from your authenticator app
mfa.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
mfa.verifyFailed: Failed to verify code. Please try again.
mfa.helpText: Having trouble? Make sure your authenticator app is synced and try again. Each backup code can only be used once.

status.passwordUpdatedRedirect: Your password has been updated successfully. Redirecting to login...
status.passwordUpdateFailedMessage: Failed to update password, please try again later
status.enterNewPassword: Please enter your new password below
